title: Logger X
description: Show Logger names on server console.
body:
This mod displays logger names on your server console.

Without this mod, you can only see `[main/INFO]` stuff, but which mod is printing this message? God knows...

After installing this mod, your console becomes this:

If the message comes from minecraft, it is marked as **`(Minecraft)`**, and if it is from mods, the name is defined by the mod developer, but ususing the same as the mod's name. (e.g. in this screenshot, `(Exposed)`)

![Console screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uUbxJxg2/images/814d68b526cb41fba2a04a3ffc9767e407a1b687.png)
